description_long: This is a grand piano with a classic, elegant design, featuring a large, curved body and three sturdy legs. The piano's exterior is finished in a dark, almost black color, giving it a sophisticated appearance. The keyboard is prominently displayed at the front, with a standard arrangement of white and black keys, and three gold-colored pedals beneath. The lid is fully closed, covering the strings and internal mechanisms, and the sides are smoothly contoured. The front panel above the keys has a decorative pattern, adding a touch of refinement. No visible brand or logo is present, and there is no music stand attached.
description: A dark, grand piano with a closed lid, visible keyboard, three pedals, and elegant curved body.
description_view_0: The left side and top of the piano are visible, showing the curved body and two of the three legs.
description_view_1: The rear of the piano is shown, highlighting the rounded back and a single rear leg.
description_view_2: The right side and top are visible, displaying the smooth curve and two legs on this side.
description_view_3: The front view reveals the keyboard, three pedals, decorative front panel, and the closed lid.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard layout with 52 white keys and 36 black keys, arranged in alternating groups of two and three black keys.
